raw_consumer_statement: Credit card Ctii XXXX XXXX. My card was charged 3 times with unauthorized charges on XX/XX/XXXX amount XXXX XXXX, on XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX, XXXX, XXXX contacted Citi with concerns of the unauthorized charges, they canceled card, issued a security credit and a new credit card. When new credit card arrived it was already activated and recharged of the unauthorized charges plus 3 new additional unauthorized charges. That card was replaced with another new card, the new card carries the balance of the 2 replaced cards, I have been disputing with them since XX/XX/XXXX, will be calling again today, I have concerns of new replaced card coming already activated because the cardholder is the one who is suppose to activate the card, so my concerns are the activated card and security credits s being issued but are not issued, I wish to take further actions.
